gpt_comment: [FULL] All sources agree: sunny day in Brussels with no expected rain. Meteoblue indicates the temperature may reach 28.3°C (83°F), a notable 7°C higher than baseline's 21.3°C. It seems like it's going to be a perfect day to spot a bumblebee buzzing around in the Brussels sun!
